meta.probe: visible [id] + .g-btn/.dashTile/.card/.pickerBtn/button, cap 80, scrolled to top; summaryPanel probe scoped to #summaryPanel descendants
meta.sequence: guest entry; team "P2 Test Team" (roster 9/12/17, goalie 31); opponent "P2 Baseline"; setup probed with team selected + opponent filled + dropdown open; live probed after 1 Shot Against + 1 Shot For #9; summary/summaryPanel probed after End Game confirm (summary screen keeps live header; summaryPanel is the scoped summary content); panels probed stacked open in order history->season->playerStats; teamModal probed in add-team form state; helpModal/accountModal probed with all three panels open behind. NOTE: "summary" and "pickerModal" keys duplicate the live screen due to the 80-rect cap hitting before late-DOM content — use "summaryPanel" for the summary screen diff.
